entity: Blake Griffin BKN stint 2020-2022 wore #2 (stable anchor)
notes: Griffin signed with Brooklyn mid-2020-21 after his Pistons buyout and wore #2 through 2021-22 (BBR BKN numbers page). Stint extended to end_year 2022 after the 2026-07 curated-layer rebuild surfaced his previously-missing 2021-22 BKN season row.
